welcomeIntroduction.line1Prefix: Welcome to the command deck. I'm your
welcomeIntroduction.line2: Horsepower, torque, and FFMI core metrics are fully synced.
welcomeIntroduction.line3Prefix: Enter a diagnostic question to run a
welcomeIntroduction.line4: Six-axis telemetry and your tier decode only — general training encyclopedia is out of scope.

dynoIntel.replyAssessmentDeepDiveNudge: Each assessment page includes fuller scoring notes and norm context — open that page and expand the info section for the complete picture.

replyClosingCue.default: Uplink complete. This telemetry is logged on the host — come back and track your own progress curve; I'll be here.
replyClosingCue.questionFocus: {{axisLabel}} holds at {{score}} pts{{tierSuffix}} — the host has locked this read; worth revisiting on your next uplink.
replyClosingCue.chassisBalance: Chassis weakest on {{weakestLabel}} ({{weakestScore}} pts), strongest on {{strongestLabel}} ({{strongestScore}} pts) — balance beats a single-axis spike for the next tier.
replyClosingCue.momentumUp: Since your last uplink, {{axisLabel}} moved up {{delta}} points — the host remembers that rhythm; log it.
replyClosingCue.highTier: [{{tierTitle}}] tier locked on the host — rare spec worth revisiting on every uplink.
replyClosingCue.weakestCompanion: Weakest link: {{axisLabel}} — the next tier waits on the assessment page; I'll stay on this host while you fill the gap.

closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose0: Score {{axisScore}} — logged on the host; don't let this spec live only on screen.
closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose1: The host remembers the {{axisScore}}-pt curve — next uplink, compare against yourself, not others.
closingBeatSecondLine.passionClose2: This tier band isn't decoration — it's your physique's signature on this host; sign it again.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual0: Uplink closed. Come back — I'll match your progress curve on this same host.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual1: Telemetry archived. Return with fresh scores — I'll be here.
closingBeatSecondLine.returnRitual2: This read is on the host. Next time, we track only your tier curve.

gate.authDescription: Sign in with Google to power on DYNO INTEL.
gate.coreDescription: Own Core for 2 daily AI briefings (includes cross-axis diagnostics).
gate.proDescription: Weight simulation is Pro-only — 30 daily uplinks; join the arena for full DYNO channel.
gate.quotaDescription: Daily uplink exhausted. Try again tomorrow or upgrade to Pro for 30/day.

body.pro-required: ⚠️ [CONSOLE INTEGRITY ERROR]: Weight simulation uplink is locked. {{axis}} axis idles at {{score}} pts — weight simulation matrix and 30 daily uplinks are Pro-only. Ignite Pro for global ladder, cloud backup, and full DYNO telemetry.
body.quota-exhausted: ⚠️ [UPLINK CAP REACHED]: Today's 2 AI briefings (including cross-axis) are spent. {{axis}} axis still idles at {{score}} pts — upgrade to Pro for 30 daily uplinks and weight simulation.

paywall.billingFail: Billing link failed — try again or restore purchases in Settings.

error.network: Telemetry link lost — try again shortly.
error.geminiNotConfigured: Gemini uplink offline — set GEMINI_API_KEY in functions/.env.local and restart npm run dev:dyno.
error.geminiQuotaExhausted: Gemini API prepay credits depleted — top up in AI Studio or switch to a valid API key.
error.invalidContext: Diagnostic context incomplete — complete Home radar/body data first.
error.inferenceMalformed: AI decode output malformed — shorten your question or retry shortly.
error.inferenceFailed: AI telemetry inference failed — try again shortly.
error.weightProfileMissing: Complete your body profile on Home before running weight simulation.
error.quotaExhaustedPro: Daily uplink cap reached (30/day) — return after reset.

telemetryLog.title: Telemetry evolution logs
telemetryLog.empty: No prior uplinks on this host.

localTelemetry.title: DYNO INTEL TELEMETRY
localTelemetry.subtitle: Local uplink telemetry — scannable Client / Emulator / Auth readiness.
localTelemetry.serverNote: Server bypass and GEMINI_API_KEY live in functions/.env.local; launch with npm run dev:dyno. If Callable still returns pro-required, check Emulator Functions logs first.

humanBrief.prPercentileFallback:
【Global Peer PR Percentile Data Is Actively Being Gathered】
When sufficient data is accumulated, this feature will unlock via a backend sync. We sincerely invite you to recruit new players to accelerate the calibration of this ultimate coordinate of human physical limits!
humanBrief.hallOfFameSentence: In the Hall of Fame sanctum, you share the same throne coordinate as {{names}}.

hallOfFame.legalShield: All athletic performance metrics of world-class athletes and celebrities stored in this matrix represent their career-peak states, compiled from verified global public archives and official event chronicles. Any unpublished or missing dimensions are calculated via high-precision predictive models by the Dyno Intel Sports Science Research Center, based on cross-disciplinary physiological norms, muscle fiber recruitment ratios, and biomechanical traits. This matrix is not a clinical or sanctioned sporting certification. Data is not 100% absolute and is provided solely for leaderboard simulation, cross-era benchmarking, and entertainment purposes.
hallOfFame.blockedReply: In the deepest sanctum of the Dyno Intel Pantheon, this tier has officially crossed into the echelon of elite genetic outliers and peak human godhood. Your current aggregate physical capacity has not yet unlocked this gravitational field. Train harder, leave everything on the gym floor, and return with new numbers. When you push your metrics to the absolute threshold, the Core Mind will unlock the gateway for a direct, cross-era benchmarking session with the legends of this tier in your exclusive briefing.
